benefits.description: Sciatic nerve pain relief and improved mobility after 5.5 months of limping
Reduced pain symptoms from sciatic nerve impingement; pain no longer debilitating after walking or computer use
Improved ability to tolerate physical therapy workouts with more flexibility and pain tolerance
Gut function improved after stopping other medications

protocol_notes: Started September 2, 2022. Injected subcutaneously into belly fat area. Discontinued Advil and painkillers around same time as starting BPC-157. Concurrent physical therapy with lateral glute stretches and massage therapy. Significant improvement noted after approximately 10 days (around September 12). Continued use through at least mid-October (1.5 months reported). Considering adding TB-500 to stack. User notes air bubbles in injection may cause slight dose variance.
